nodes.context: New York City sneak thief gang during the 1860s, organized by fence John D. Grady.

nodes.original_text_name: Marm Mandelbaum who had formed a gang of her own
nodes.context: Rival gang formed by fence Marm Mandelbaum, competing with Grady Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Later, he competed against rival fence Marm Mandelbaum who had formed a gang of her own.
edges.context: Grady Gang competed against Marm Mandelbaum's gang as rivals.
